public,get_client_view_by_token,CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_client_view_by_token(p_token text)
IF p_token IS NULL OR trim(p_token) = '' THEN
SELECT * INTO cv FROM public.project_client_views WHERE token = trim(p_token) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, client, deadline, created_at, status
INTO proj FROM public.projects WHERE id = cv.project_id
